text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Turbo. It's nothing 
impressive, but we planned a little 
birthday party for you.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
For real?! Woohoo, a birthday party!! 
And Turbo's the birthday girl!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
By the way, it'll be Ikuno's and my birthday 
in a few days too.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Having multiple celebrations 
clumped together makes the occasion 
all the more festive.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
So among us three, Turbo's birthday 
comes first…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it's totally gone to her head.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Turbo's number one! Turbo's number one!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now I'm kinda annoyed, so I say 
we call off Turbo's birthday party.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
With our birthdays coming up so soon, 
we can simply celebrate hers then as well.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: No, no, no!! You have to do it today!
